title: helichrysum diffusum
intro: Helichrysum diffusum, also known as the yellow cudweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to southern Europe and western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum diffusum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to help with wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum diffusum are often taken in the form of tea, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
